# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.external.com
  resolution: DNS
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.external.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.external.com
        port:
          number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-db
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.external.com
  resolution: DNS
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-db
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.external.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: db.external.com
        port:
          number: 5432
